info.description: Client reviews shown on the home page and /testimonials

name.description: The customer's name, shown next to their review

role.description: Their job title or how they describe themselves, e.g. "Shop Owner", "Homeowner"

quote.description: What they said about working with you — shown as the review text

iconColor.description: Color of the round initial badge shown when no photo is uploaded

photo.description: Optional real headshot — falls back to a gradient initial avatar when unset. Never use a stock or someone else's photo without their consent.
